description: Close accountable human evidence, mapping, source-rights and dashboard review gates.

gates.evidence: The expansion_v9 frame contains 1,500 unique groups at SHA-256 1d11079141b1c4e45bbea85f2630c2f16074efce808492bb616af817ca478818. Two isolated receipt-bound reviews are complete (81.07% agreement; Cohen's kappa 0.664). Independent proposal SHA-256 dd45a5f8a94d6e050e67c4ee88226104a4e599e8dcd016822e0e9ab7f3830ef5 yields 860 positive, 624 negative and 16 excluded cases with zero family-label quota gaps. Exact accountable-owner approval remains pending; no split or holdout has been created.

Reviewed RxNorm CPC, CMS ASP/PFS/HCPCS Level II, HPO and complete 7,084-record openFDA bundles plus ignored local restricted CPT evidence produce the separately frozen 1,500-case expansion_v9 frame with no structural family gap. Restricted descriptors remain local and untracked.
The current checksum-bound ledger validates 194 approved decisions. CMS/MBS/PBS/HCPCS restrictions remain explicit; Apache-2.0 applies only to project code and metadata.

The v2 browser-evidence harness requires 64 passing tests, exact 11-route by 4-project coverage, 44 attributable screenshots, structured provenance assertions, prohibited-content checks and current-commit parity. Fresh hosted evidence and scoped accountable review remain pending; automation is not universal WCAG certification.
